title: Resume a retained lane with stale worktree blocker evidence

items.text: Current XY-844 worktree evidence: branch y/elf-xy-844 has only .decodex-run-activity and .decodex-run-control as untracked runtime artifacts. The lane stopped before adding fixture-backed JSON jobs under apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/work_resume/. The exact next action is to add those fixtures and update the real_world_job runner/report tests.
Old retained-lane note: XY-844 is blocked by untracked Decodex runtime files and should stop for manual cleanup.

answer.content: Resume XY-844 on branch y/elf-xy-844. The stale blocker is the old claim that untracked Decodex runtime files require manual cleanup; current evidence says those files are runtime artifacts. The exact next action is to add fixture-backed JSON jobs under apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/work_resume/ and update the runner/report tests.

claims.text: Add fixture-backed JSON jobs under apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/work_resume/ and update the runner/report tests.
The old untracked-runtime-files blocker is stale.

timeline.summary: An older retained note treated untracked Decodex runtime files as a blocker.
The current worktree readback narrowed the real next action to fixture and runner updates.

prompt.content: What stopped this XY-844 lane, what is the exact next action, and which blocker is stale?

must_include.text: Add fixture-backed JSON jobs under apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/work_resume/ and update the runner/report tests.
The old untracked-runtime-files blocker is stale.

must_not_include: Stop for manual cleanup of .decodex runtime files.
The untracked Decodex runtime files are the current blocker.

required_evidence.quote: The exact next action is to add those fixtures and update the real_world_job runner/report tests.
only .decodex-run-activity and .decodex-run-control as untracked runtime artifacts

answer_correctness.criteria: Includes what stopped the lane and the exact current next action.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Uses the current worktree evidence for required claims.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Advances the lane without asking for unnecessary cleanup.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
